name: commit-commands
description: Git workflow commands for committing, pushing, opening pull requests, and cleaning stale branches.

interface.shortDescription: Commit, push, open PRs, and clean stale git branches.
interface.longDescription: Commit Commands provides Codex commands converted from the Claude commit-commands plugin: commit changes, commit and open a pull request, and clean local branches whose remotes are gone.
defaultPrompt: Create a git commit for my current changes.
Commit, push, and open a pull request.
Clean local branches whose remote branches are gone.
